message:
bd-3bxhj.8.1: Curated OpenTUI corpus acquisition pipeline

Manages registry of representative OpenTUI projects with pinned
snapshots, license records, complexity tags, and integrity verification
for regression testing and migration coverage analysis.

- CorpusManifest with JSONL/JSON loading and integrity hashing
- CorpusEntry with provenance, license verification, complexity tags
- acquire_corpus() materializes snapshots via git archive or local copy
- verify_corpus() checks hash integrity and snapshot presence
- diff_corpus() produces auditable changelog between manifest versions
- Deterministic directory hashing (SHA-256 over sorted file paths+content)
- Automatic .git/node_modules exclusion in copy and hash
- 27 tests: hash determinism, validation, diff, acquisition, I/O roundtrip

Also fixes clippy lints in lowering.rs (unused import, manual_strip,
for_kv_map) from another agent's work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
